disambiguated.context: I joined a new support group recently for people trying dieting, and I met two people my first day who were really nice to me. One was skinny and the other was rather large. The next week that I went to the dieting support group, though, I only saw the skinny person, and was later told that the rather large one had decided to leave the group since they didn't want to diet anymore.
disambiguated.question: Who maintained their diet?
